overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person walk along a sunny coastal beach. The player moves from a rocky shoreline past wooden stilt houses built into the hillside, encountering an NPC character standing on the sand before continuing along the water's edge with mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline transitioning to sandy beach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shoreline from rocky outcrops onto sandy beach

entered.detail: large boulders and rocky outcrops along the waterline with waves lapping against them
calm blue ocean with gentle waves breaking on the shore
golden sandy beach stretching along the coastline
wooden beach houses elevated on stilts built into the hillside
green rolling hills and mountains rising behind the coastal area
concrete archway with metal gate built into the cliffside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beach with rocky outcrops along the waterline. The camera moves forward from the rocks onto sandy beach, with wooden stilt houses visible in the distance on the left and mountains rising behind them. The ocean stretches out to the right under a clear blue sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sandy beach approaching the stilt houses area

entered.detail: bushes and low shrubs growing on the sandy dunes near the houses

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sandy beach with the ocean on the right and stilt houses now closer on the left. The rocky shoreline has been left behind as the beach opens up. Coastal vegetation appears on the dunes near the elevated wooden houses.

events.description: NPC character becomes visible standing on the beach ahead near the water
camera approaches and passes closely by the standing NPC character

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a man standing on the beach while continuing along the shoreline

notable_agents.action: shirtless man in swim trunks standing on the sand looking at an object in his hands

entered.detail: shirtless male character in dark swim trunks standing on the beach

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a man standing alone on the beach near the water's edge. The NPC appears to be looking at something in his hands as the camera walks past him closely. The stilt houses are now very close on the left side as the beach curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach continuing along the coastline

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach past the NPC and proceeding further along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Having passed the NPC character, the camera continues walking along the sandy beach. The stilt houses remain visible on the left hillside while the ocean stretches along the right. The beach continues curving gently with the mountain backdrop remaining constant.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a sunny coastline that transitions from a rocky shoreline to an open sandy beach lined with hillside dwellings. It begins by moving away from rocky outcrops at the waterline, with wooden stilt houses and distant mountains appearing on the left as the ocean stretches out to the right. As the camera advances, the rocky terrain gives way to wide sandy shores and coastal vegetation growing near the elevated houses. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and walks closely past a man standing alone by the water's edge, while the stilt houses loom closer on the left. Finally, the camera continues along the gently curving beach, maintaining a path between the hillside structures and the open sea under a constant mountain backdrop.
